progress.title: Importing Resume
progress.description: Keep this window open. You'll be taken to the editor as soon as the import finishes.
progress.validatingDescription: Confirming the file type and import strategy.
progress.parsingDescription: Calling the model to extract structured resume data.
progress.savingDescription: Writing the imported resume into the local workspace.

fallback.title: Native desktop runtime required
fallback.body: Interview sessions, streamed follow-up questions, and report generation rely on native Tauri commands. Launch the desktop app to use this feature.

lobby.title: JD Mock Interview
lobby.subtitle: Paste a job description, pick any mix of the 6 preset interviewer roles, practice each round in sequence, and finish with a desktop report you can review.
lobby.emptyBody: Start from a job description, pick the interviewer roles you want to practice with, and jump straight into a saved desktop interview flow.

setup.pageSubtitle: Lock in the job description first, then decide the interviewer sequence. JD is required; linking a resume is optional.
setup.title: Interview Setup
setup.subtitle: This MVP runs the interviewers in the order you choose, saves each round locally, and takes you straight to the report when the final round ends.
setup.jobTitlePlaceholder: For example: Senior Frontend Engineer / Product Manager / Staff Engineer
setup.jdPlaceholder: Paste the full JD, including responsibilities, requirements, and bonus points. The more complete it is, the more realistic the questions will feel.
setup.jdHint: A good JD usually includes responsibilities, hard requirements, and business context.
setup.rolesHint: Click a role card to add or remove it. Use the right column to reorder the rounds.
setup.selectionSubtitle: Every round is saved to the local workspace, and a basic report is generated at the end.
setup.jdPending: Once you add the JD, this area will show a quick summary of the session.
setup.rolesEmpty: Choose at least one interviewer to begin.
setup.createError: Failed to create the interview. Please try again.

room.loadError: Failed to load the interview session.
room.notFoundBody: It may have been deleted, or the native workspace has not finished initializing yet.
room.waiting: Preparing the opening question for this interviewer...
room.inputPlaceholder: Type your answer here. The more concrete and specific you are, the better the follow-up questions will be.
room.autosaveHint: Each turn is saved to the local workspace automatically.
room.markError: Failed to update the review marker.

report.generateError: Failed to generate the report. Please try again.
report.notFoundBody: The basic report is generated automatically after the last round finishes.
report.subtitle: The MVP report includes an overall score, a short summary, overall feedback, and concrete improvement suggestions.
report.improvementsHint: These suggestions prioritize the gaps that showed up most clearly during the interview.

fields.politicalStatusOptions: Citizen,CYL Member,CPC Probationary Member,CPC Member,Democratic Party

pdf.exportError: PDF export failed. Please try again.

ai.exaPoolApiKeyHint: Exa config is stored locally and used for web search and content fetching.

aiChat.description: Chat with AI to optimize your resume content, rewrite bullet points, and tailor your experience for any role.

templates.title: Professional Templates
templates.description: Choose from a curated collection of modern, ATS-friendly templates designed by hiring experts.

dragDrop.description: Easily rearrange sections, customize layouts, and build your resume exactly the way you want.

export.description: Export as PDF, Smart One-Page PDF, Word, HTML, TXT, or JSON. Import a previously exported JSON to instantly restore or create a resume.

cta.title: Ready to Build Your Best Resume?
cta.subtitle: Build, tailor, and export your resume in one workspace. No mandatory sign-up for fingerprint mode.

linkedinPhoto.title: AI LinkedIn Photo
linkedinPhoto.subtitle: Upload a selfie, generate a professional LinkedIn headshot
linkedinPhoto.apiKeyHint: API Key is stored locally in your browser, never uploaded to any server.
linkedinPhoto.uploadHint: Drag & drop or click to upload. JPG, PNG (max 5MB)
linkedinPhoto.cameraError: Cannot access camera. Please check permissions.
linkedinPhoto.promptDefault:
Transform this casual selfie into a polished, corporate-grade LinkedIn headshot.

Identity preservation: Maintain the subject's exact facial structure, skin tone, eye color, hair color and style, and all distinguishing features — the result must be unmistakably the same person.

Lighting: Simulate a three-point studio setup — soft key light at 45° camera-left, gentle fill light camera-right, and a subtle rim/hair light to separate the subject from the background. Avoid harsh shadows or blown-out highlights.

Background: Clean, slightly out-of-focus neutral gradient (light grey to soft blue-grey). No distracting elements.

Composition: Tight head-and-shoulders crop, subject centered, eyes at upper-third line. Slight 10-15° body angle toward camera-left with face turned back toward camera for a natural editorial feel.

Attire & grooming: Refine clothing to appear neat and professional. Smooth minor skin blemishes while preserving natural skin texture — do not over-retouch.

Technical quality: Ultra-sharp focus on the eyes, shallow depth of field (f/2.8 equivalent), no chromatic aberration, no noise. Output resolution should match or exceed the input image.

Mood: Confident, approachable, and trustworthy — appropriate for senior professional or executive branding.
linkedinPhoto.requirementsPlaceholder: e.g., dark suit, blue background, smiling...
linkedinPhoto.resultPlaceholder: Your LinkedIn photo will appear here
linkedinPhoto.resultPlaceholderHint: Upload a selfie and click Generate
linkedinPhoto.errorNoApiKey: Please enter your Gemini API Key first
linkedinPhoto.errorInvalidKey: Invalid API Key, please check and try again
linkedinPhoto.errorSafety: Image did not pass content safety review, please try a different photo
